name: Orange and Spice Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fresh parsley or 1 Tbsp Dried parsley flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle roast with lemon juice and salt.
2. In an ovenproof skillet, cook the bacon until crisp. Remove from pan; crumble; set aside.
3. Brown the roast in drippings. Drain fat.
4. Combine crumbled bacon, undrained tomatoes, orange juice, onion, parsley (fresh or dried), sugar, cinnamon, garlic, cloves, and bay leaf in a medium bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the roast.
6. Bake, covered, at 325 degrees for 2 to 2 1/2 hours or until the roast is tender.
7. Transfer the roast to a serving platter; cover with foil.
8. Remove cloves and bay leaf from the pan juices.
9. Mix flour in cold water.
10. Add the mixture to the pan juices. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly, about 1 minute more.
11. Pass the gravy over the meat.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
